name: coach
description: Personal coaching session using CLEAR protocol with anxiety-first surfacing and Goldsmith accountability loop.
---

# Coach

Run a structured personal coaching session.

## Instructions

- Parse `$ARGUMENTS`: none/personal → run CLEAR protocol; pro/family/review → stub message
- Step 1 PULSE: capture energy/mood/stress (1-10) — required before proceeding
- Step 2 SURFACE: ask "What are you avoiding right now?" + "What emotion comes up?"
- Step 3 ACCOUNTABILITY: surface previous commitment from 06-coaching/daily/; ask what happened
- Step 4 EXPLORE: reframe avoidance pattern, link to OKRs and health projects
- Step 5 COMMIT: one specific action + deadline — required before review
- Step 6 REVIEW: "What shifted?" then write session output to 06-coaching/daily/YYYY-MM-DD.md
